summary: See clues file for full details. 9 tossups, 11 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 9 tossups and 11 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: In a painting by this artist, a bust, likely of Pythagoras, faces left over a guitarist who reads the sheet music on the lap of a woman seated on the ground.
examples: In a painting by this artist, a bust, likely of Pythagoras, faces left over a guitarist who reads the sheet music on the lap of a woman seated on the ground.

clues.clue: This artist of The Scale of Love depicted four actors dressed as stock characters below a man in a white commedia dell'arte costume who stands facing the viewer in the painting Gilles  or Pierrot .
examples: This artist of The Scale of Love depicted four actors dressed as stock characters below a man in a white commedia dell'arte costume who stands facing the viewer in the painting Gilles  or Pierrot .

clues.clue: A man offers his hand to a woman climbing a step while a couple examines a large painting of nudes in a painting by this artist, in which men pack a portrait of Louis XIV into a wooden box.
examples: A man offers his hand to a woman climbing a step while a couple examines a large painting of nudes in a painting by this artist, in which men pack a portrait of Louis XIV into a wooden box.

clues.clue: This artist of The Shop Sign of Gersaint  also painted several cupids flying in the air as a procession of couples approaches a golden gondola.
examples: This artist of The Shop Sign of Gersaint  also painted several cupids flying in the air as a procession of couples approaches a golden gondola.

clues.clue: An artist of this movement, derided by one contemporaneous critic as "capable of everything-except the truth," created a portrait of a woman in a green dress adorned with pink roses and bows.
examples: An artist of this movement, derided by one contemporaneous critic as "capable of everything-except the truth," created a portrait of a woman in a green dress adorned with pink roses and bows.

clues.clue: A woman holds a white dog with a blue-ribboned leash in one of several "Fantasy Figures" painted by an artist of this movement.
examples: A woman holds a white dog with a blue-ribboned leash in one of several "Fantasy Figures" painted by an artist of this movement.

clues.clue: Venetian artist Rosalba Carriera painted portraits identified with this movement.
examples: Venetian artist Rosalba Carriera painted portraits identified with this movement.

clues.clue: The back of a female sculpture appears behind a guitar-holding (*) Mezzetin in a painting of the stock commedia dell'arte character from this movement.
examples: The back of a female sculpture appears behind a guitar-holding (*) Mezzetin in a painting of the stock commedia dell'arte character from this movement.

clues.clue: Madame de Pompadour commissioned portraits from Francois Boucher, an artist of this movement.
examples: Madame de Pompadour commissioned portraits from Francois Boucher, an artist of this movement.

clues.clue: A painting by this artist depicts a man pointing at a book on a woman's lap mid-page-turn as a gentleman serenades them with a Spanish guitar.
examples: A painting by this artist depicts a man pointing at a book on a woman's lap mid-page-turn as a gentleman serenades them with a Spanish guitar.

clues.clue: A version of a painting by this artist of The Love Lesson in the Louvre depicts a hazy landscape with a mountain and river in place of a boat.
examples: A version of a painting by this artist of The Love Lesson in the Louvre depicts a hazy landscape with a mountain and river in place of a boat.

clues.clue: In another version of that painting, a small dog stands next to a man in red facing away from the viewer and holding a staff.
examples: In another version of that painting, a small dog stands next to a man in red facing away from the viewer and holding a staff.
